title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: CopilotKit is a framework for integrating AI agents with frontend applications, enabling generative UI where agents render real components. It supports shared state management, human-in-the-loop approval flows, and agent-native interfaces beyond bolted-on chatbots, positioning itself as an alternative to Vercel AI SDK and custom implementations.
writeup: This Better Stack video introduces CopilotKit, a framework for building agent-native applications with generative UI. It explains how the framework renders real UI components rather than basic chat windows, supports shared state across React and Next.js apps, and enables human-in-the-loop approval workflows for AI agents. The takeaway is a concrete look at moving agent interfaces beyond chat toward interactive components integrated into existing web stacks.
